Morocco • Modern Moroccan and international

Kabana Rooftop

Kabana works for Marrakech because it gives visitors a polished rooftop meal near the medina after dense souk and garden touring.

4.4 812 reviews · Modern Moroccan and international · $$$

Price

About this restaurant

Kabana works for Marrakech because it gives visitors a polished rooftop meal near the medina after dense souk and garden touring.

Signature dish

Tagines, mezze, seafood, and rooftop sunset drinks

Practical information

Reserve for sunset and use a reliable taxi or walking route from your riad.

Nearby attraction

This restaurant is recommended for travelers visiting Marrakech & Atlas Gateway.
